user_prompt: Collect some relevant news articles about Agentic AI software services, and write a marketing post about FlowAI
content:
Are you tired of drowning in repetitive tasks that steal your precious time? Welcome to FlowAI Core, your personal AI-powered assistant designed to reclaim your day!

Imagine saving an incredible 2 hours each day—time you can spend on what truly matters. With FlowAI, you’ll experience intelligent automation that learns your unique workflow and seamlessly integrates with over 50 of your favorite tools.

Whether you're managing emails, scheduling meetings, or tracking projects, FlowAI takes care of the heavy lifting, allowing you to focus on creativity and innovation.

For just $29 a month, you can start transforming the way you work. Join the professionals already experiencing the magic of working less and flowing more.

Ready to revolutionize your productivity? Dive into a smarter future with FlowAI today!

#FlowAI #ArtificialIntelligence #MachineLearning #DataScience #TechInnovation #Automation #AIForBusiness #SmartSolutions

📰 Sources:
- https://www.forbes.com/sites/gauravsharma/2026/05/16/why-quality-data-not-big-data-is-critical-for-process-efficiencies/
- https://cryptoslate.com/app-days-are-numbered-the-end-state-of-software-is-private-personal-verified-and-ai-agent-built/
- https://github.com/microsoft/AI-Engineering-Coach
- https://fortune.com/article/why-microsoft-ai-chief-mustafa-suleyman-predicts-ai-automation-18-months/
- https://www.activistpost.com/the-invisible-occupation-how-palantir-and-ai-built-a-financial-prison-the-masses-cheered-for/
